latin: Magister discipulis clamavit: 'ultra fines vestros ite! plus ultra!' iuvenis sine virtute natus tamen somniabat se heroem maximum futurum esse.

questions.prompt: What was special about the young person?

translation: The teacher shouted to his students: 'Go beyond your limits! Plus Ultra!' A youth born without power still dreamed that he would become the greatest hero.
